claim_bullets.bullet_text: Mad spirit of life pours excessive life spirit power into a target each round (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.185-187).
Ogres, also known as jikininki, are carnivorous titans that enjoy human flesh (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.185-187).
Yeti mainly fight when hungry, and are weak to fire attacks (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.185-187).

source_record_text: This section describes various titan monsters found in the Sword World RPG setting, including their characteristics, abilities, and behaviors.
